description: List invite codes with filtering. Requires admin or moderator role.

main.description: Retrieve a paginated list of invite codes with optional status filtering.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

status.description: Filter by invite status: active, expired, or exhausted.

usesCount.description: Number of times the code has been used.

expiresAt.description: Expiration timestamp, or null if no expiration.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invite was created.

createdByHandle.description: Handle of the user who created the invite.

status.description: Current status of the invite: active, expired, or exhausted.

total.description: Total number of invites matching the filter.
